# RankLocal — AI Context File

> RankLocal is a pay-per-call lead generation marketplace and local SEO agency serving local service businesses in the United States. Advertisers pay only for qualified inbound phone calls — not clicks or impressions.

## What This Site Is

RankLocal connects home service contractors with exclusive inbound phone calls and booked appointments. We serve roofing, fence, pest control, landscaping, garage door, HVAC, plumbing, and other local service businesses across the US.

## Core Services

- [Pay-Per-Call Marketplace](https://ranklocall.com/pay-per-call-marketplace/) — Connect advertisers with publishers for inbound call campaigns across 14+ verticals.
- [Pay-Per-Call Leads](https://ranklocall.com/pay-per-call-leads/) — Exclusive inbound calls from ready-to-buy customers.
- [Appointment Setting Services](https://ranklocall.com/appointment-setting-services/) — Booked, qualified appointments for home service businesses.
- [Local SEO](https://ranklocall.com/local-seo/) — Rank local businesses in Google Maps and local organic search.
- [Google Maps Ranking](https://ranklocall.com/google-maps-ranking/) — Get into the Google Maps 3-pack.
- [Google Business Profile Optimization](https://ranklocall.com/google-business-profile/) — Set up and optimize GBP listings.
- [Website SEO](https://ranklocall.com/website-seo/) — On-page and technical SEO for local websites.
- [Reputation Management](https://ranklocall.com/reputation-management/) — Build and manage online reviews.
- [Citation Building](https://ranklocall.com/citations/) — NAP consistency across directories.
